gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 用错位的语音留言编织出一段跨越生死的浪漫，笑中带泪的惊喜之作。
gems.whyWatchEn: A delightful romantic comedy that uses misdirected voicemails to weave a poignant, laugh-out-loud story about love and loss.
gems.audience: 喜欢《真爱至上》式多线叙事、不落俗套的浪漫喜剧爱好者，以及能接受泪点与笑点并存的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of unconventional romantic comedies with emotional depth, and viewers who enjoy heartfelt stories that balance humor and tears.
